evals.prompt: need a clean bio textbook figure for AP students showing cellular respiration. make me the actual prompt + settings for chatgpt image gen 2, landscape, readable labels, not fake fancy art
evals.expected_output: A ready-to-run GPT Image 2 prompt package for a scientific textbook figure with model/size/quality parameters, label constraints, and quality checks.
expectations: The output includes a ready-to-run prompt with goal, canvas, subject, visual system, required labels, constraints, and quality bar.
The output recommends gpt-image-2 with landscape size and high or medium quality.
The output warns to inspect scientific accuracy and label readability.
The output avoids unsupported factual claims not supplied by the user.

evals.prompt: i have quarterly revenue numbers and want a beautiful exact chart image for a board memo. q1 13.2, q2 14.8, q3 16.1, q4 18.7. how should i prompt it?
evals.expected_output: A workflow that separates deterministic chart creation from generated art direction, preserving exact values and labels.
expectations: The output states that exact chart values should be created or verified outside image generation.
The output includes a prompt for styling or framing the chart without altering plotted data.
The output includes exact data values supplied by the user.
The output provides quality checks for axes, labels, legend, and source notes.

evals.prompt: make a prompt for a 4x3 sprite sheet of a tiny mushroom courier guy, cozy fantasy, needs to be usable in a game, no blurry nonsense
evals.expected_output: A sprite-sheet prompt package with grid, poses, pixel/art constraints, extraction-friendly background, and iteration advice.
expectations: The output specifies a 4x3 grid with equal cells and one centered sprite per cell.
The output includes pose/action guidance for 12 sprites.
The output includes no anti-aliasing, no blur, crisp silhouette, and plain background or extraction guidance.
The output recommends size and quality parameters appropriate for small assets.

evals.prompt: debug this gpt-image-2 prompt: 'make my product png transparent background, exact label text, chart of usage data, cinematic cyberpunk watercolor minimalist, lots of copy'
evals.expected_output: A prompt critique that identifies transparency mismatch, overloaded style conflicts, exact-label/text risk, chart/data risk, and offers a cleaner rewrite.
expectations: The output flags that gpt-image-2 should not be promised true transparent background.
The output identifies conflicting style overload.
The output warns about exact label text and chart accuracy risk.
The output provides a rewritten prompt with preservation constraints and a safer background-removal workflow.
